/usr/bin/c++  -Wall -Werror -Wno-error=stringop-overflow -Wno-error=array-bounds -Wnon-virtual-dtor -Wsuggest-override -Wshadow -Wextra-semi -fno-rtti -Wno-maybe-uninitialized -march=native -mtune=generic -Wno-deprecated -O3 -DNDEBUG -fno-trapping-math -fno-math-errno -DBUILD_TYPE_RELEASE CMakeFiles/synchronization_test.dir/stop_event_test.cpp.o CMakeFiles/synchronization_test.dir/sync_event_test.cpp.o -o synchronization_test  ../../../../lib/support/libocudu_support.a ../../../../lib/ocudulog/libocudulog.a -lgtest -lgtest_main ../../../../lib/support/math/libocudu_support_math.a ../../../../lib/ocuduvec/libocuduvec.a ../../../../lib/ocudulog/libocudulog.a ../../../../external/fmt/libfmt.a
